items.title: Does Goldman Sachs Partnership Mark a New Era for T. Rowe Price’s Growth Story (TROW)?
items.description: Goldman Sachs recently announced a partnership with T. Rowe Price Group to offer alternative investments such as private credit and private equity funds to affluent clients, with a full suite of strategies targeted for launch by mid-2026. This business collaboration is positioned to diversify T. Rowe Price's product lineup and respond to the growing demand for access to private markets among high-net-worth investors. We'll examine how this move into alternative investments with Goldman Sachs...
